notes.AQI_column_in_features: PASS — AQI target column explicitly removed before feature matrix construction
notes.AQI_lag_features_used: PASS — AQI-prefixed lag columns excluded at recovery stage (P1_City_Recovery block)
notes.AQI_rolling_stats_used: PASS — AQI rolling statistics excluded at recovery stage
notes.AQI_category_features_used: PASS — AQI_category, AQI_bucket columns never included in X matrix
notes.Future_information_leakage: PASS — time-based chronological split; no shuffle; seq generation uses only [t-seq..t-1]
notes.Train_test_contamination: PASS — scaler fitted on train split only; test rows never seen during fit
notes.Scaler_fit_on_train_only: PASS — MinMaxScaler.fit() called on X_train, then transform applied to val/test
notes.Chronological_split_verified: PASS — 70/15/15 split on sorted time index; no random shuffle
notes.Same_timestamp_pollutants_in_TrackA_only: PASS (by design) — Track A uses same-t pollutants; Track B strictly forbids them
notes.Track_B_excludes_same_t_pollutants: PASS — 11 same-t pollutant columns excluded at data loading in all Track B blocks

important_caveat: Track A achieves R²~0.99 because AQI is a deterministic piecewise-linear function of same-timestamp pollutants. This is AQI ESTIMATION (formula reconstruction), not temporal forecasting. This distinction is scientifically critical and must be explicitly stated in the paper.
